title: onoclea variabilis
intro: Onoclea variabilis, also known as the variable fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Onoclea variabilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of fever and rheumatism. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to make a medicinal tea by steeping the leaves in hot water.
